name: okpack-vuln-kev-import
_note: THE seed. Pulls the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog (~1200 actively-exploited CVEs) into cves/ — one canonical page per CVE. no_agent, ZERO LLM tokens. MERGE-writes. KEV updates near-daily, so daily/every-few-hours would also be reasonable; weekly is the conservative default.
prompt: Seed actively-exploited CVEs from the CISA KEV catalog. Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-vuln-feed-fetch
_note: Enabled by default but HARMLESS until you populate feeds.opml (ships empty; ZERO upstream calls until you opt in). Optional ongoing advisory signal on top of the KEV seed. The @jitter:2h schedule is expanded to a random minute at install.
prompt: okpack-vuln feed pull: fetch the vuln OPML into raw/vuln/ for the ingest lane. Pure script, wakeAgent=false.

name: okpack-vuln-nvd-import
_note: Enriches EXISTING cve/ pages (from KEV) with authoritative CVSS + CWE from the NVD 2.0 API. BOUNDED (CVEs modified in the last 7 days) and ENRICH-ONLY by default — creates no new pages, keeping the vault KEV-curated (actively-exploited focus). `--stub-new` opts into HIGH/CRITICAL discovery. no_agent, ZERO LLM tokens, MERGE-safe. Set NVD_API_KEY to lift the anon rate limit.
prompt: Enrich CVE pages with CVSS/CWE from NVD. Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-vuln-cve-mentions
_note: CVE 'in the news' signal: counts how many source/briefing docs mention each CVE ID in prose and stamps report_mentions + recent_report_mentions onto the cves/ pages, feeding the Vulnerabilities tab's 'Top CVEs by reporting' ranking. no_agent, ZERO LLM tokens, MERGE-safe, idempotent. Daily tracks fresh reporting.
prompt: Tally CVE mentions across reporting and stamp report_mentions on cve pages. Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.
